IC Sessions.Regime_Consensus: Crypto: CRASH/BEAR/CRASH | IPO: BLOCKED | GDXJ: BROKEN
IC Sessions.Chair_Executive_Summary: All three silos are blocked this session and no capital will be deployed. The Crypto silo is in a full bear regime with its algorithmic gate closed, the IPO Shorts silo has no eligible candidates in the pipeline, and the Junior Mining silo's regime is broken with all gate legs returning no data. For any silo to proceed, the following must change: Crypto requires a regime shift and a confirmed open algorithmic gate; IPO Shorts requires at least one eligible lock-up expiry candidate to appear in the candidates tab; and Junior Mining requires its GLD, TIP, and VIX gate legs to return valid readings and confirm a non-broken regime. Full capital of £48 remains idle and carries forward unchanged.
IC Sessions.Chair_Governance_Record:
Session 20260329_IC. Main Committee Chair review of all three silo sub-committee reports.

(1) SILO GATE STATUS AND REGIME:
Crypto Mid-Cap Spot: Regime is FULL_BEAR with 0% allocation. Algo gate is CLOSED. BTC vs 200DMA and 90-day return data both returned N/A, indicating the algorithmic gate cannot confirm OPEN status. Sub-committee returned DO NOT PROCEED with conviction 0/5. AXS was surfaced as a candidate at $1.12 (+1.1% 7d) but is ineligible under FULL_BEAR regime rules. No further analysis warranted.

IPO Lock-Up Shorts: Gate BLOCKED. The IPO_Candidates tab contains no eligible candidates. No lock-up expiry or days-to-entry data available. Sub-committee returned GATE BLOCKED with conviction 0/5. This is a structural data absence, not a regime or signal failure.

Junior Mining GDXJ: Gate BLOCKED. Regime is classified as BROKEN. All three gate legs — GLD, TIP, and VIX — returned N/A, meaning the regime assessment cannot be completed. Sub-committee returned GATE BLOCKED with conviction 0/5.

(2) SUB-COMMITTEE VERDICTS:
All three silos returned either DO NOT PROCEED or GATE BLOCKED. No silo reached a PROCEED or CONDITIONAL verdict. Per verdict rules, when all sub-committees return DO NOT PROCEED or are gate-blocked, the Main Committee Chair verdict is DO NOT PROCEED.

(3) CONTENTION ANALYSIS:
No contention analysis required. No silo is requesting capital deployment. A-040 contention rules are not triggered.

(4) CAPITAL SUFFICIENCY AND EXCHANGE CAPS:
Total capital £48, deployed £0, available £48. Deployment cap of 90% equates to £43.20. 30% permanent off-exchange reserve (Revolut) equates to £14.40. Exchange exposure cap of 70% equates to £33.60. All constraints are satisfied trivially as no deployment is occurring.

(5) PORTFOLIO HEAT:
Portfolio heat is 0%. No open positions across any silo. Maximum simultaneous position limit of 3 is not approached.

(6) STANDING MONITORING ITEMS:
All three silos require independent recovery conditions before any session can proceed. Priority hierarchy under A-040 remains provisional; no silo is approaching 25 filtered trades, so no revalidation flag is triggered this session.

IC Sessions.Regime_Consensus: Crypto: CRASH/BEAR/CRASH | IPO: BLOCKED | GDXJ: BROKEN
IC Sessions.Chair_Executive_Summary: All three silos — Crypto Mid-Cap Spot, IPO Lock-Up Shorts, and Junior Mining GDXJ — are gate-blocked this session, producing a unanimous DO NOT PROCEED verdict. Crypto remains in a full bear regime with Bitcoin nearly 27% below its 200-day moving average and a deeply negative 90-day return; IPO Shorts has no qualifying candidates in the pipeline; and the GDXJ regime composite is broken across all three gate legs. No capital will be deployed today. For reconsideration, the most critical change needed is a regime shift in at least one silo — most likely GDXJ restoring its gate legs or IPO Shorts surfacing a qualifying lock-up expiry candidate, as the crypto bear regime appears the furthest from resolution.
IC Sessions.Chair_Governance_Record:
Session 20260329_IC. Main Committee Chair review of all three silo sub-committee reports.

(1) SILO GATE STATUS AND REGIME:
Crypto Mid-Cap Spot: Regime FULL_BEAR. Algo gate CLOSED. BTC at $66,433.10 is materially below the 200DMA of $91,069.96, and the 90-day return of -24.9% fails the mandatory >0% threshold. Both gate conditions are unmet. Sub-committee verdict: GATE BLOCKED. Conviction 0/5.
IPO Lock-Up Shorts: Regime BLOCKED. No qualifying candidates in the lock-up expiry pipeline. Sub-committee verdict: GATE BLOCKED. Conviction 0/5.
Junior Mining GDXJ: Regime BROKEN. All three gate legs (GLD, TIP, VIX) returned N/A, indicating the regime composite is not constructive. Sub-committee verdict: GATE BLOCKED. Conviction 0/5.

(2) SUB-COMMITTEE VERDICTS:
All three sub-committees returned GATE BLOCKED verdicts with zero conviction. No silo produced a PROCEED or CONDITIONAL recommendation. Per verdict rules, when all sub-committees are gate-blocked or return DO NOT PROCEED, the Main Committee Chair verdict is DO NOT PROCEED.

(3) CONTENTION ANALYSIS:
No contention analysis required. No silo is requesting capital deployment. A-040 contention rules are not triggered.

(4) CAPITAL SUFFICIENCY AND EXCHANGE CAPS:
Total capital £48, deployed £0, available £48. Deployment cap of £43 (90%) is fully intact. The 30% permanent off-exchange reserve (Revolut) is respected. No exchange exposure concerns. Capital is sufficient and ready for deployment when gate conditions are met.

(5) PORTFOLIO HEAT:
Portfolio heat is 0%. No open positions across any silo. Maximum 3 simultaneous positions constraint is not a factor this session.

(6) BULL OVERRIDE CHECK:
Bull override (A-040 Rule 4) not checked. Crypto regime is FULL_BEAR, which is the inverse of the BULL condition required to trigger the override assessment. Dual confirmation criteria (IC analyst conviction ≥4/5 AND algo gate OPEN) cannot be met.

(7) STANDING MONITORING ITEMS:
All three silos remain gate-blocked. Priority hierarchy provisional under A-040; no silo has approached 25 filtered trades. No revalidation flag required this session.

Crypto Mid-Cap Spot: Regime classified FULL_BEAR with 0% allocation. Algo gate is CLOSED. Both BTC vs 200DMA and 90d return inputs are N/A, indicating a likely data feed or initialisation issue rather than confirmed bear readings. Verdict returned as UNKNOWN — treated as non-actionable for this session. ALGO candidate noted at $0.10 with +16.5% 7d return but cannot be actioned under FULL_BEAR regime regardless of momentum.
IPO Lock-Up Shorts: GATE BLOCKED. No eligible candidates present in the IPO_Candidates tab. Conviction 0/5, no candidate, no lock-up expiry data. Silo is structurally operational but pipeline is empty.
Junior Mining GDXJ: GATE BLOCKED. Regime is UNKNOWN due to all three gate legs (GLD, TIP, VIX) returning N/A. This is a data or initialisation failure. Until regime can be classified, the silo cannot proceed.

(2) SUB-COMMITTEE VERDICTS:
All three silos are non-actionable this session. Crypto returns UNKNOWN (effectively DO NOT PROCEED under FULL_BEAR with closed gate). IPO and GDXJ both return GATE BLOCKED. No sub-committee returned PROCEED or CONDITIONAL.

(3) CONTENTION ANALYSIS:
No contention applicable. No silos are requesting capital deployment. A-040 contention rules not triggered.

(5) PORTFOLIO HEAT:
Zero heat. No open positions across any silo. Portfolio is at rest.

(6) STANDING MONITORING:
Data pipeline issues affect both Crypto (N/A gate inputs) and GDXJ (N/A gate legs). These must be resolved before meaningful regime classification is possible. IPO pipeline requires candidate population. Priority hierarchy remains provisional at zero filtered trades across all silos.
